title: Dot Crosshair
body:
# Dot Crosshair RS
A minimal Minecraft resource pack that replaces the default crosshair with a clean dot for better aim and visibility. Perfect for PvP and survival players who prefer a simple, distraction-free crosshair.

---

## ⚠️ Compatibility Note
- Tested on Vanilla Minecraft Only
- Not Tested with Mods
